query:
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.userId,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p WHERE p.establishmentId = e.id) as productCount,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories c WHERE c.establishmentId = e.id) as categoryCount
FROM establishments e 
WHERE e.name LIKE '%Big Norte%' OR e.name LIKE '%big%';
